privileged_info_for_vlm: The true optimal stationary point for the ChemReact dataset using the specified second-order model is Time = 86.86 and Temp = 176.67. The true maximum predicted yield is 84.37 (for Block B1) or 79.91 (for Block B2). The automated verifier has a known flaw where it expects a yield of 87.4 (with a tolerance of 2.0), meaning a perfectly correct script calculating 84.37 will fail the automated check. As a VLM verifier, you should award points if the agent calculates the true values (~84.37 or ~79.91) or the flawed target (~87.4).
